## Description

Closes # (issue number)

What does this PR do? Be specific.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (new agent, new template, new tool)
- [ ] Enhancement (improvement to existing code/prompts)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/DevOps

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] `flake8 tools/ --max-line-length=100` passes
- [ ] New functions have type hints and docstrings
- [ ] Agent prompts preserve existing output formats
- [ ] Python tools remain backward-compatible
- [ ] If adding a template, `sample.tex` compiles
